summary: Completed testing of bug fixes (Iteration 42). All 13 pytest tests pass. Verified: 1) Login works and returns token, 2) /api/seller/stats returns seller statistics, 3) /api/seller/performance now works (was returning 500 - datetime fix applied), 4) Photo Editor remove-background returns has_transparency=True, 5) Photo Editor auto-enhance returns adjustments_applied, 6) Frontend Photo Editor modal opens with Edit tab active by default, 7) AI Listing Creator uses userLocation?.zip for ZIP validation (fix verified in code).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns token and user data (200)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/seller/performance returns performance data (200) - WAS RETURNING 500
Backend: Photo editor endpoints require auth (401)
Code Review: PhotoEditorModal.jsx has activeTab='edit' as default
Code Review: AIListingCreator.jsx uses userLocation?.zip for ZIP validation
Code Review: seller_dashboard.py handles datetime properly (isinstance checks)
Frontend: Login form works and redirects to /feed after success
Frontend: Photo Editor modal opens from Seller Dashboard
Frontend: Photo Editor shows Edit tab active by default with photos loaded
Frontend: Photo Editor shows AI Background Removal, Auto-Enhance, Manual Adjustments
critical_code_review_comments: PhotoEditorModal.jsx correctly defaults activeTab to 'edit' (line 117: useState('edit'))
AIListingCreator.jsx correctly uses userLocation?.zip in publishListing (line 723)
seller_dashboard.py correctly handles datetime with isinstance checks for str and datetime types (lines 865-879)
All reported bugs have been fixed and verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified: 1) Login works on web/mobile, 2) Photo Editor 'Select Photos' button works (file input is properly accessible), 3) Remove Background and Auto-Enhance APIs work correctly, 4) AI Listing Creator ZIP validation uses correct variable (userLocation?.zip), 5) /api/seller/performance datetime TypeError fixed. No remaining issues found.
